subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-05-30
subcodes.first_line: I am most pleased with these expressions of kindly feeling and evidences
subcodes.first_line_orig: از احساسات جناب رایس نهایت خشنودی را دارم و همچنین از احساسات وکیله ایشان
subcodes.subjects: @ether; the phenomenon of light, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal, @universal peace; world unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @essential vs. actional attributes of God, @unity in diversity
